fields.label: Property Type
fields.description: Google Analytics 4 is the latest version. Universal Analytics is an older version that is not fully functional after the end of June 2023.

fields.label: Property
fields.description: The Property of Google Analytics (provide the ID)

fields.label: Metrics
fields.description: The quantitative measurements of a report. For example, the metric eventCount is the total number of events. Requests are allowed up to 10 metrics. (JSON object; supported keys: metricValues, metricValues.listName, metricValues.name, metricValues.expression, metricValues.invisible)

fields.label: Dimensions to split by
fields.description: Dimensions are attributes of your data. For example, the dimension city indicates the city from which an event originates. Dimension values in report responses are strings; for example, the city could be "Paris" or "New York". Requests are allowed up to 9 dimensions. (JSON object; supported keys: dimensionValues, dimensionValues.listName, dimensionValues.name)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Simplify Output
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: currencyCode, dimensionFiltersUI, metricAggregations, metricsFiltersUI, keepEmptyRows, orderByUI, returnPropertyQuota)

fields.label: View
fields.description: The View of Google Analytics (provide the ID)

fields.label: Metrics
fields.description: Metrics in the request (JSON object; supported keys: metricValues, metricValues.listName, metricValues.name, metricValues.expression, metricValues.formattingType)

fields.label: Dimensions to split by
fields.description: Dimensions are attributes of your data. For example, the dimension ga:city indicates the city, for example, "Paris" or "New York", from which a session originates. (JSON object; supported keys: dimensionValues, dimensionValues.listName, dimensionValues.name)

fields.label: View Name or ID
fields.description: The view from Google Analytics. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return
